summary: Shaka Sticky Logic and Icon Swapping - All features verified working. Backend tests: 14/14 passed. Frontend tests: All core behaviors verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.js ReactionIcon component (lines 24-63) - Well implemented with spring transition using cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) for smooth morphing
Feed.js longPressActiveRef (lines 376-400) - Sticky menu logic works correctly - menu stays open after finger release
Feed.js ReactionOverlay (lines 125-135) - Properly handles tap-outside-to-close behavior
notifications.py /realtime/broadcast endpoint (lines 146-195) - Endpoint exists and returns graceful failure when Supabase not configured
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_shaka_sticky_reactions.py - Created new test file for reaction and broadcast tests
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Kelly Slater account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Shaka sticky logic features verified working. Login flow works correctly when using data-testid selectors. Previous iteration 37 mentioned login issue but it's working now with proper test approach.

sticky_menu_behavior.description: Reaction picker menu STAYS OPEN after long-press release. Only closes on emoji select or tap outside/X button.

icon_morphing.description: Shaka icon morphs to selected emoji (🔥/🌊/❤️) with spring transition (cubic-bezier 0.3s)

close_on_select.description: Picker closes when emoji is selected

close_on_tap_outside.description: Picker closes via X button and overlay click

reaction_toggle.description: Selecting same reaction again removes it (toggle behavior)

realtime_broadcast_endpoint.description: POST /api/realtime/broadcast endpoint exists and handles requests (returns success:false when Supabase not fully configured)

notification_on_reaction.description: POST /api/notifications endpoint creates notifications for post author when reaction is added
